P0 Board directive 2026-04-19: internal state does not flow to external repo. Today 0 commits all session; origin/main HEAD = 978d4da4 @ 08:00, local = same HEAD with many working-tree modifications. External consultants reviewing GitHub see stale snapshot. This is governance gap twin of CZL-BRAIN-AUTO-INGEST. Required design: (1) hash+mtime-based auto-commit trigger every N minutes with sanity check (no commit if failing tests, no commit if CROBA violations within last N min) (2) semi-auto push that respects Board Decision Rules (commit/push to main = CEO or CTO authority per AGENTS.md:948; eng-* roles never push) (3) CIEU event emission on each commit/push cycle (4) integration with session_close_yml.py to ensure session close always flushes (5) preserve manual workflow — auto-push must be overridable and must never push incomplete / mid-edit state. Architectural review by Ethan expected to happen as part of CZL-BRAIN-AUTO-INGEST ruling (both are 'internal state → external' governance gaps). Implementation owner: Ryan-Platform after Ethan rules. NO git push during implementation itself (obviously).

P0 Board directive 2026-04-19: brain currently passive (structurally capable but not wired into decision flow). Board question '工作时是否真的在通过大脑工作' answer: no. Fix = 3-loop live architecture. Loop 1: pre-query brain injection at decision time (module exists, NOT wired). Loop 2: post-decision activation writeback + Hebbian co-activation counting (module does NOT exist, new build). Loop 3: periodic dream consolidation on Board offline >=4h OR session close (aiden_dream.py exists, scheduling inactive). Architectural review should merge with CZL-BRAIN-AUTO-INGEST ruling as joint ingest+live scope — Ethan ruling to specify: (a) which hook event pre-query fires on (UserPromptSubmit vs PreToolUse) (b) write-back schema for activation_log entry (c) Hebbian increment policy (capped 1.0, decay constant) (d) dream trigger condition + idempotency guard. Implementation: Ryan (hook wiring), Leo (semantic/Hebbian layer), Maya (dream integration). NO git push.

Per Maya CZL-REWRITE-AUDIT: normalizer v2 incorrectly maps 'route' and 'dispatch' into 'rewrite' canonical bucket (56 decision_canonical='rewrite' events, 46 are ROUTING_GATE_CHECK + 3 CTO_BROKER dispatches). Split 'route' + 'dispatch' into a new 'route' canonical bucket, re-normalize existing rows. Update 74-test suite for new bucket. Impact: Leo Phase 2 algorithm (contrastive drift) currently using wrong canonical distribution — fixing this before Phase 2 ship is prerequisite to avoid mis-targeted drift. NO git push. Owner: Leo-Kernel (author of v2).

Board 2026-04-19 consultant insight: pre-hook escape samples (611 pure + 52K warn-as-escape) are SYSTEM BLINDSPOT COORDINATES, not rule-edge-case failures. My CEO spec treated them as negative-pull (weight -0.3) which moves brain AWAY from these coordinates. That's the opposite of what we want — they're precious teaching signal showing where governance WAS blind. Required: (1) revise bipartite loader to split escape into pre-hook (positive-learning signal: 'remember these blindspots') vs post-hook (negative-pull for rule-edge-case). (2) add to Leo Phase 2 spec open questions for Ethan arch re-review. (3) update CEO spec Section 3.4 with this reversal + citation to Board consultant. Owner: CEO for spec update + Ethan for architectural re-ruling + Leo for loader semantics. NO git push.
Phase 2 of kernel ordering fix: hoist restricted_write_paths check before policy fallback. Mirrors Phase 1 immutable hoist. Unblocks Samantha#6 retry of AMENDMENT-020 paste.

Board 2026-04-19 directive (inspired by gbrain zero-LLM auto-extraction): extend brain ingestion to auto-create nodes/edges from CIEU events. Our structured fields make this easier than gbrain's free-text case. Auto-extract 6 entity types (Agent / Rule / File / Tool / Command / Session) and 6 relation types (triggered_rule / touches_file / dispatches_to / blocked_by / co-touched-with / co-fired-with). Frequency thresholds: entity ≥3 occurrences, edge ≥2. Rare-tail kept in separate staging table. Integrates into CZL-BRAIN-AUTO-INGEST boundary (c)+(d) — extends scan source from files-only to files+CIEU. Hebbian seeding: co-occurrence count becomes initial edge weight (capped 0.3 — manual curation still bounded). Gated on Leo#2 add_node fix + Ethan Q8 access_count-increment fix landing first. Architectural review by Ethan required. Implementation owner: Leo-Kernel (semantic extraction logic) + Ryan-Platform (hook+scheduler integration). NO git push.

P0 lock-death path #11 (Samantha#6 diagnosis 2026-04-19): scripts/.ystar_active_agent is shared resource with no per-session isolation. Concurrent sub-agent dispatch overwrites the marker within <1 tool call, causing secretary push to race-lose against eng-* / cto identities. CEO 11-way parallel spawn triggered marker write-storm (hook_debug.log 16:10-16:11 shows 10+ alternating writes between 5 roles). Fix: suffix marker file with session_id OR process PID (.ystar_active_agent.<session_id>), fallback read chain in hook_wrapper.py:76 + agent_stack.py:24. Test gate: push_agent('secretary') holds marker across 10 concurrent hook invocations from other roles. Add lock-death entries #11 (marker-contention) + #12 (daemon-exit-mid-dispatch) to memory/project_lockdeath_pattern_10paths. NO git push.

P1: Build L2 outcome-weighted Hebbian write-back module. Leo-Kernel: new file scripts/hook_ceo_post_output_brain_writeback.py implementing CEO v2 Section 3.3 formula (negative lr=0.15, positive lr=0.10, asymmetric). Exclude provenance=system:brain per CTO Q6 self-ref guard. Emit BRAIN_HEBBIAN_UPDATE_POSITIVE and BRAIN_HEBBIAN_DECAY CIEU events. Module constant OUTCOME_WINDOW_SECONDS=900. Ryan-Platform: wire hook on PostToolUse(Agent)+PostToolUse(Stop) in settings.json, build async co-activation queue with 30s drain cycle, measure learning-lag KPI <5s for Hebbian sync path. Warm-start silence: suppress L2 when activation_log<5000 rows, emit BRAIN_WARMUP_PENDING. Within-session Hebbian only (no cross-session aggregation). Success: mock decision->negative CIEU event within 15min->Hebbian decay fires->weight decreases. NO git commit/push/add/reset.

P1: Implement cieu_bipartite_learner.py per CTO CZL-BRAIN-BIPARTITE-P2-ALGO-ruling.md (7 sections H.1-H.7). Leo-Kernel scope. Key parameters: LAMBDA_CONTRASTIVE=0.5 fixed, RADIUS_MULTIPLIER=0.5 with diagnostic assertion (median relevance>=20), checkpoint in aiden_brain.db node_checkpoints table (retain last 20), time-based held-out (last 7 days), Leo delta-from-old formula (supersedes CEO original), REWRITE gate excluded (3-condition gate, corpus>=50), escape semantic reversal (pre-hook +0.6 positive, post-hook -0.3 negative, PRE_HOOK_CUTOFF constant). Uses Leo normalizer v3 training_eligible field. Batch composition: pre_hook_escape joins positive pool, escape 5pct floor uses post-hook first, backfill pre-hook at -0.1. Emit BIPARTITE_RADIUS_DIAGNOSTIC + BIPARTITE_REWRITE_GATE_CLOSED CIEU events. Depends on L2 Hebbian being live (Card 1). Success: run 1 pass on current CIEU corpus, KL divergence computed on 7-day held-out, checkpoint saved, no assertion fires. NO git commit/push/add/reset.

P1: Maya-Governance scope. Build dominance monitor per CEO v2 Section 4, CTO-ratified thresholds 10pct and 20pct. Compute per L1 query: fraction of last 100 L1 queries where node X was top-1. If X exceeds 10pct: emit BRAIN_NODE_DOMINANCE_WARNING with node_id and frequency. If X exceeds 20pct: emit BRAIN_NODE_DOMINANCE_ALERT and reduce X effective weight by 50pct in next 50 queries (transient suppression). Report to CEO via next boot report if more than 3 alerts in 30 days. Use sliding window of last 100 queries (not time-based). Integrate into hook_ceo_pre_output_brain_query.py call path -- monitor runs after L1 query returns top-k, before injection. New file brain_dominance_monitor.py with DominanceTracker class. Store query history in aiden_brain.db dominance_log table (query_id, top1_node_id, timestamp). Success: inject 100 synthetic queries with 15 hitting same node then warning fires, 25 hitting same node then alert fires plus weight suppression applied. NO git commit/push/add/reset.
